analyst_note: Main claim: "Including the use of certified climate projects to compensate any residual scope 1 and 2 emissions" (SBM-Offshore-Annual-Report-2025.pdf, p12). SBTi: no validated target in the SBTi database. 8-Test: 4 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 0 MISSING -> PASS. Offshore-energy contractor. Disclosure is structured (2016 base year, intermediary 2030 targets, ISAE limited assurance) but four MED flags reflect an offset-reliant near-term 'climate neutral' claim, SBTi-guideline-based (not...
